race.comment: HAY STREET (9) progressive gelding who savaged the line for an unlucky second to Wanaruah over 1100m at Scone in BM78 class. Hard fit now and can go one better despite drawing out. JUST RESPONSE (18) improving gelding who deserves his chance in this class fourth-up. Anchored late with the 58kg for a close-up sixth over 1300m at Scone in BM72 class. Down in the weights and placed on the heavy surface. DAMIEN (12) snagged back from the sticky gate on resumption and held up in the straight when tenth over 1200m at Gosford. Gets map favours here and can bounce back quickly. MIDNIGHT OPAL (2) got too far back last start but was good late. Better draw will have him closer and the 3kg claim could prove pivotal.
